message:
fix: log levels, missing indexes, GPU update error (#7701-#7730) (#7741)

* fix: promote error/panic log levels and use structured logging

- Panic recoveries: slog.Info -> slog.Error in server_operations.go,
  server_ai.go, server_http.go (issues #7704, #7705, #7706, #7707)
- Operational errors: slog.Info -> slog.Warn for partial failures in
  gateway.go, mcp_resources.go; slog.Info -> slog.Error in nightly_e2e.go
  (issues #7701, #7702, #7703)
- Dropped error values: include err in AI provider and MCP bridge logs
  in server.go (issues #7708, #7709)
- Auto-update warnings: slog.Info -> slog.Warn for binary path and
  restart log failures in update_checker.go (issues #7710, #7711)
- Structured logging: replace fmt.Printf with slog in kc-agent main.go,
  console main.go, and registry.go (issues #7712, #7713, #7714)
- Silent return: add slog.Warn for skipped unreachable clusters in
  rbac.go (issue #7715)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: add missing indexes, promote closed_by_user to schema, fix GPU update error

- Add index on card_history(user_id, swapped_out_at) to avoid full
  table scans on GetUserCardHistory (issue #7716)
- Add indexes on feature_requests(github_issue_number) and (pr_number)
  for webhook processing (issue #7717)
- Fix pending_swaps index column order from (swap_at, status) to
  (status, swap_at) matching equality-then-range query pattern (#7718)
- Promote closed_by_user into CREATE TABLE definition so new databases
  do not rely on migration ordering (issue #7727)
- Distinguish "not found" from "quota exceeded" in
  UpdateGPUReservationWithCapacity by checking row existence when
  RowsAffected==0, returning ErrGPUReservationNotFound for HTTP 404
  instead of misleading 409 (issue #7730)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

-
-KubeStellar Console - Local Agent v%s

+	slog.Info("KubeStellar Console - Local Agent starting", "version", agent.Version)

@@ -67,7 +59,7 @@ KubeStellar Console - Local Agent v%s

 	go func() {
 		<-sigChan
-		fmt.Println("\nShutting down...")
+		slog.Info("Shutting down")
 		os.Exit(0)
 	}()

@@ -544,7 +545,8 @@ func (m *MultiClusterClient) CountServiceAccountsAllClusters(ctx context.Context
 			defer wg.Done()

 			if err != nil {
-				return // skip unreachable clusters, same as before

+				return
 			}
 			mu.Lock()
 			total += count
